source: Lei do Orcamento do Estado 2024, Decreto-Lei 2024
residency_requirement: Must not have been tax resident in Portugal for the previous 5 years
application_deadline: March 31 of the year following the year of becoming tax resident
eligible_activities: Qualified jobs in entities with relevant investment projects

foreign_income.dividends: Exempt if taxed in source country
foreign_income.interest: Exempt if taxed in source country
foreign_income.capital_gains: Exempt if taxed in source country (except PT-source)
foreign_income.rental_income: Exempt if taxed in source country

notes: NHR was closed to new applicants after December 2023. IFICI replaced it from January 2024 with stricter eligibility criteria focused on scientific research and qualified professionals.
